validation.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

biometrics.cancelled: Biometric authentication cancelled. Please enter your password.
biometrics.failed: Biometric authentication failed. Please enter your password.

privateKey.title: Import Private Key
privateKey.subtitle: Use your private key to import a single address

warning.title: Security Note
warning.description: Never share your seed phrase or private key with anyone. Store them in a secure location.

importSeedPhrase.title: Import Seed Phrase
importSeedPhrase.subtitle: Enter your 12-word seed phrase to restore your wallet

guidelines.title: How to enter your seed phrase:
guidelines.description:
• Enter each word separated by a space
• Make sure all words are spelled correctly
• Include all words in the correct order
• Double-check before importing

errors.invalidWords: Invalid seed phrase. Must be exactly 12 words.

alert.title: Invalid Seed Phrase
alert.generic: Failed to validate seed phrase. Please try again.

importPrivateKey.title: Import Private Key
importPrivateKey.subtitle: Enter your private key to import a single address wallet

form.label: Private Key
form.placeholder: Enter your private key (64 hex characters)

warning.title: ⚠️ Security Warning
warning.description:
• Private keys give full control over your wallet
• Never share your private key with anyone
• Import only from trusted sources
• Consider using seed phrase import instead

errors.invalidFormat: Invalid private key format. Must be 64 hexadecimal characters.
errors.invalidKey: Invalid private key. Please check your input.

alert.title: Import Failed
alert.generic: Failed to import private key. Please try again.

importWallet.title: Import Wallet

mnemonic.label: Seed Phrase

errors.invalidWords: Invalid seed phrase. Must be 12 or 24 words.
